daily.today_energy: The universe is giving you soft, introspective vibes today. It's a perfect moment to tune into your intuition and let yourself exist without forcing productivity. Trust the quiet moments.
daily.love: Someone's been thinking about you more than you realize. Whether single or coupled, your emotional depth is magnetic right now. Don't shy away from vulnerability—it's your superpower today.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. Even small contributions matter more than you think. Focus on collaboration over competition; your unique perspective is exactly what's needed.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentleness. Whether it's a slow walk, stretching, or just staying hydrated, honor what feels good. Mental peace flows when you're not pushing yourself to the limit.

weekly.overview: The cosmos is basically giving you permission to trust your gut this week. Mercury's shifting energy means your intuition is actually running the show—lean into those random hunches that feel weird but somehow right.
weekly.love: Venus is whispering softly in your corner, making vulnerability feel less scary and more like the move. Whether you're single or coupled up, showing your real self is what's gonna hit different this week.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is peaking, and honestly, it's time to pitch that idea you've been sitting on. The universe is backing bold moves—just make sure you're speaking your truth clearly because people are actually listening.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentler energy right now. Think less hustle, more flow—yoga, journaling, or just existing without a checklist. Rest isn't laziness; it's your spiritual love language at the moment.
